intro.title: MarinZen
intro.description: MarinZen helps you discover your Ayurvedic body constitution (Prakriti) and provides personalized guidance for diet, lifestyle, yoga, skincare, and daily wellness routines. Based on your unique Dosha, MarinZen creates a balanced path toward better health.

customization.title: Personalized Wellness
customization.description: Get diet, yoga, and lifestyle guidance.

discover.title: Discover Your Prakriti
discover.subtitle: Answer a few questions to find out your dominant Dosha and receive personalized wellness recommendations.
discover.main_subtitle: Choose how you want to begin your personalized Ayurvedic journey.
discover.opt1_desc: Answer a few guided questions to identify your Ayurvedic body constitution.
discover.opt2_desc: Select your dosha directly and continue to your personalized dashboard.

result.title: Your Dosha Result
result.desc_vata: Vata is associated with movement, lightness, creativity, and variability.
result.desc_pitta: Pitta is associated with heat, sharpness, intensity, and transformation.
result.desc_kapha: Kapha is associated with stability, strength, calmness, and endurance.

dashboard.title: Your Wellness Dashboard
dashboard.desc_quiz: Personalized suggestions based on your body-mind analysis.
dashboard.desc_manual: Wellness recommendations tailored to your selected constitution.
dashboard.blueprint_desc: Ayurvedic guidance rooted in Sri Lankan tradition, aligned with your
dashboard.footer_tagline: Rooted in Sri Lankan Ayurvedic Tradition

vata.description: As a Vata type, you embody the qualities of air and space — creative, quick-thinking, and always in motion. Your path to balance lies in warmth, grounding routines, and nourishing practices.

pitta.description: As a Pitta type, you carry the fire of transformation — sharp intellect, strong digestion, and natural leadership. Balance comes through cooling foods, serene environments, and self-compassion.

kapha.description: As a Kapha type, you embody the nurturing qualities of earth and water — loving, patient, and naturally resilient. Your wellness journey thrives with movement, light foods, and daily invigoration.
